question.question: What happens to unexercised stock options after an employee leaves TechCorp?
question.expected_answer: After leaving TechCorp, employees have 90 days to exercise their vested options. After 90 days, unexercised options expire.
question.chunk_text: You will have 90 days following your last day of employment to exercise any vested options. After 90 days, unexercised options expire.

model_answer:
After an employee leaves TechCorp, unexercised stock options expire 90 days after their last day of employment. 

Source: techcorp_company_policies.md
